Free text
Numerical, Area code and 8 digit space (max 10 char)
(XX) XXXX XXXX
VALIDATION RULES/FUZZY LOGIC:
•	Standards Compliance: All phone numbers must conform to the E.164 numbering format

•	Allowed Input Formats:
o	May be entered with or without spaces, dashes, or parentheses for readability.
o	Only accept as a domestic Australian number (see below).

•	Australian Numbers:
o	Domestic landline format: (0x) xxxx xxxx where x is a digit and 0x is a valid area code (e.g., 02, 03, 07, 08).
o	Mobile format: (04) xxxx xxxx 
•	Validation Checks:
o	Strip spaces, dashes, and parentheses before validation.
o	Ensure the number contains digits only.

•	Examples:
o	Valid: 03 1234 5678, 04 1234 5678
o	Invalid: +61 123, 041234567890, +999 123 456 (invalid country code)
